author: shiro
description: Owner-controlled Red cog that connects whitelisted Discord channels to a local Ollama server.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores owner-configured settings and bounded recent per-channel conversation context in Red's Config. It sends prompts and recent context only to the configured Ollama base URL.
install_msg: OllamaChat installed. Load the cog, whitelist a channel with `[p]ollamaset channel add`, and check `[p]ollama status`.
short: Chat with a local Ollama server from whitelisted Discord channels.
